title: Fancy Glass
description: Additional glass variants and styles added
body:
![Imgur](https://i.imgur.com/rRkDDJR.png)

Only using glass or stained glass to build your home can get a bit boring sometimes - this is where this mod comes in! There is a bigger variety of glass forms you can build with such as frosted glass or framed glass! These pretty glass variations are the perfect addition to every house build!

<details>
<summary>More Info</summary>

Frosted glass can be made by combining glass with a block of sand to create a frosted surface. This, alongside stained glass, can be used to make framed glass using an iron ingot with either of the glass types.

</details>
